# 3D Portfolio

> Interactive 3D portfolio website of Bérenger, a Fullstack developer and creator of ClipboardX.

## Context
This project is a single-page interactive 3D portfolio built with Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS (v4), and Three.js. It features an interactive WebGL tunnel background that responds to mouse and touch movement, with smooth scrolling powered by Lenis.

## Technologies
- **Bundler & Build Tool:** Vite (v8)
- **Language:** TypeScript (~6.0)
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS (v4) & Custom Vanilla CSS
- **3D Graphics:** Three.js (v0.184)
- **Utilities:** Lenis Smooth Scroll, Lucide Icons

## Key Files
- `index.html`: Main landing page structure, metadata, SEO keywords, values, technology tags, and contact links.
- `src/main.ts`: Main entry point setting up the Three.js scene (PerspectiveCamera, CustomTunnelCurve, WebGLRenderer), cursor position tracking (mousemove/touchmove), rendering loop, and Lenis smooth scrolling.
- `src/styles.css`: Global styles using `@import "tailwindcss";` and styling for list items.

## Guidelines & Rules
- **Aesthetics:** Maintain the dark-themed, minimalist, high-quality visual style (solid white badges for values, translucent `bg-white/10` with borders for technologies).
- **Performance:** Keep the rendering loop (`tick` in `src/main.ts`) optimized, maintaining 60 FPS. Ensure resize handlers correctly update projection matrices and renderer sizes.
- **SEO & Semantics:** Always verify semantic elements and descriptive title/meta attributes.
